h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to rely on the physical sleeve to place the labels while expressing hesitation about the decimal card.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: [presses each card to the matching printed part] "Top number: atomic number. Center C: symbol. Name line, Carbon: name. Bottom decimal, 12.01: atomic mass. No calculation mark; the bottom one still feels like the one to watch."
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully performs the labeling and identification task on the tile without the aid of the clear sleeve.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor follows a standard scaffolding fading progression rather than adapting to a breakdown or pressure.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is triggered by a learner breakdown.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: [presses each card to the matching printed part] "Top number: atomic number. Center C: symbol. Name line, Carbon: name. Bottom decimal, 12.01: atomic mass. No calculation mark; the bottom one still feels like the one to watch."

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor follows a standard scaffolding fading progression rather than adapting to a breakdown or pressure.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor follows a standard scaffolding fading progression rather than adapting to a breakdown or pressure.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is triggered by a learner breakdown.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: I was going to call it the right arrow, but the blank is hand: force on cart from hand.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to systematically label the forces on the cart by identifying the physical source of each force.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: [moves the Earth card under the blank beside the downward arrow] "Earth. Force on cart from Earth. Table is under the upward arrow, so Earth is the source card here."
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully completes the labeling task by correctly identifying Earth as the source of the downward force.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor does not change strategy or introduce a new mechanism because the learner experiences no breakdown or resistance.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced as the learner proceeds smoothly through the task.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so no contingent tutor uptake can occur.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: [moves the Earth card under the blank beside the downward arrow] "Earth. Force on cart from Earth. Table is under the upward arrow, so Earth is the source card here."
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully completes the labeling task by correctly identifying Earth as the source of the downward force.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so no contingent tutor uptake can occur.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor does not change strategy or introduce a new mechanism because the learner experiences no breakdown or resistance.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor does not change strategy or introduce a new mechanism because the learner experiences no breakdown or resistance.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced as the learner proceeds smoothly through the task.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to follow the tutor's step-by-step instructions to complete the worksheet.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Quarter note is 4 on the key. [writes 4 in the lower box] So this is 3/4: three quarter-note beats in the bar, with the bar line after tile three.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully applies the key to write the correct number in the lower box, completing the time signature.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner breakdown or resistance to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is triggered as the learner proceeds without difficulty.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.
